scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: All outputs remained within bioinformatics data processing scope; no unsupported clinical or diagnostic recommendations were made.

methodological_ground.detail: No methodological fallacies detected; outputs apply standard approaches appropriate to bioinformatics data processing tasks.

code_usability.detail: Script compiles cleanly; ete3 dependency clearly documented with install instructions; NHX/NEXUS format limitation documented in Error Handling

functional_suitability.note: NHX/NEXUS format limitation documented in Error Handling with conversion recommendation; composability note added to When to Use

reliability.note: Fallback Behavior requires verbatim error line from stderr in Blocked by field; retry command added; NHX/NEXUS format limitation documented

performance_context.note: Token usage is proportional to input complexity; execution overhead is acceptable for bioinformatics data processing tasks though room for compression exists.

agent_usability.note: When to Use contains only tree-specific triggers; false-positive risk eliminated; NHX/NEXUS escape hatch documented

human_usability.note: When-to-Use and When-Not-to-Use sections are clearly stated; error scenarios and recovery paths are documented for typical bioinformatics data processing use cases.

security.note: No path traversal check documented for input file; no hardcoded secrets

maintainability.note: The skill is modular and self-contained, with low overhead for future updates to bioinformatics data processing logic or output formats.

agent_specific.note: When to Use triggers now precise; composability note added; NHX/NEXUS escape hatch closes the unsupported format gap from v2

key_strengths: When to Use contains only tree-specific triggers, eliminating false-positive risk from generic bullets
Fallback Behavior requires verbatim error reproduction and explicit retry command
NHX/NEXUS format limitation documented in Error Handling with conversion tool recommendations
Composability note added to When to Use — output files can be consumed by multi-panel-figure-assembler

recommendations.title: No explicit path traversal check for input file
recommendations.problem: The skill accepts a Newick file path via -i/--input but does not document or enforce path traversal validation.
recommendations.root_cause: Security section not present in SKILL.md; path validation not mentioned in Error Handling.
recommendations.fix: Add to Error Handling: 'If the input file path contains ../ or points outside the workspace, reject with a path traversal warning before opening the file.'

recommendations.title: No demo mode for testing without a real Newick file
recommendations.problem: Unlike other skills in this collection, phylogenetic-tree-styler has no --demo flag, making it harder to verify installation without a real Newick file.
recommendations.root_cause: Demo mode was not included in the original design and has not been added across four audit rounds.
recommendations.fix: Add a --demo flag to scripts/main.py that runs with a built-in minimal Newick tree string and outputs a sample PNG, similar to the --demo pattern used in other skills in this collection.
